info.title: RentMe API
info.description: RentMe peer-to-peer vehicle rental platform API. Authentication: All endpoints except public vehicle browsing require a JWT Bearer token. To get a token call POST /auth/login with email and password and include the returned token in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>'. Roles: RENTER, VEHICLE_OWNER, ADMIN.

notes.example: Please have car ready by 8 AM

post.description: Authenticate a user and receive a JWT token. Call this first before any protected endpoint. Returns userId, email, and role.
Register a new user. Role must be RENTER or VEHICLE_OWNER. ADMIN accounts cannot be self-registered.

password.description: Min 8 chars with uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special char

400.description: Validation error or email already in use

get.summary: Browse available vehicles
get.description: List all available and listed vehicles. No authentication required. Filter by type or maximum daily price.

get.summary: Get details of a specific vehicle
get.description: Get full details of a single vehicle by ID. No authentication required.

get.summary: Get vehicles within a map bounding box
get.description: Returns vehicles within the specified latitude and longitude bounding box. Useful for map-based search.

get.summary: Get public documents for a vehicle
get.description: Get all documents such as pictures and registration for a vehicle. No authentication required.

get.summary: Get all reviews for a vehicle
get.description: Retrieve all reviews posted for a specific vehicle. No authentication required.

get.summary: Get review summary for a vehicle
get.description: Get average rating and total review count for a specific vehicle. No authentication required.

get.summary: Get average rating for a vehicle owner
get.description: Get aggregate average rating for an owner across all their vehicles. No authentication required.

200.description: Average rating as a decimal number

post.description: Renter submits a booking request for a vehicle. Vehicle must be available and listed. Total amount is calculated server-side. Booking starts in PENDING status until owner approves.

vehicleId.description: ID of the vehicle to book

startDate.description: Must be today or a future date

endDate.description: Must be in the future and after startDate

notes.example: Please have the car ready by 8 AM
notes.description: Optional notes to the owner, max 500 characters

201.description: Booking created successfully in PENDING status

400.description: Validation error or vehicle not available

get.summary: Get my bookings as renter
get.description: Renter retrieves all their own bookings across all vehicles.

get.summary: Get a single booking by ID
get.description: Get full details of a booking. Accessible by the renter who made it, the vehicle owner, or an admin.

patch.description: Renter cancels their own PENDING booking.

get.summary: Get all bookings for owner's vehicles
get.description: Vehicle owner retrieves all bookings made on any of their vehicles.

200.description: List of bookings on owner's vehicles

get.summary: Get pending booking requests as owner
get.description: Vehicle owner retrieves only PENDING booking requests awaiting their approve or reject decision.

patch.summary: Approve or reject a booking as owner
patch.description: Vehicle owner approves or rejects a PENDING booking. APPROVED makes the vehicle unavailable for booked dates. CANCELLED rejects the request.

400.description: Invalid status transition or booking not found

patch.description: Owner marks an APPROVED booking as picked up. Records the actual pickup time.

get.summary: Get my vehicle listings as owner
get.description: Vehicle owner retrieves all their vehicle listings including listed and unlisted.

post.description: Vehicle owner creates a new vehicle listing. Owner must have APPROVED verification status before listing vehicles.

description.example: Well maintained sedan, perfect for city trips

400.description: Validation error or owner not verified

put.description: Update vehicle details. Only the owning vehicle owner can update. All fields are replaced.

400.description: Validation error or vehicle not found

delete.description: Hard-delete a vehicle listing. Prefer using PATCH availability with isListed false to hide a vehicle without permanently removing it.

patch.summary: Toggle vehicle availability or listing status
patch.description: Manually toggle vehicle availability and or listing visibility without affecting bookings. Use isListed false to hide from public without deleting.

isAvailable.description: If null the field is not changed

isListed.description: If null the field is not changed

post.summary: Post a review for a completed booking
post.description: Renter posts a review for a completed booking. One review per booking. Rating must be between 1 and 5.

400.description: Booking not completed or review already exists

delete.description: Delete a review. Accessible by the review author or an admin.

get.summary: Get current authenticated user profile
get.description: Get the authenticated user's own profile including role and verification status.

get.summary: Get user profile by ID
get.description: Get a user's profile by ID. Accessible by the user themselves or an admin.

put.description: Update user information. Accessible by the user themselves or an admin.

delete.description: Soft-delete or deactivate a user account. The account is preserved but marked inactive.

post.description: Admin reactivates a previously deactivated user account.
Vehicle owner submits identity documents for KYC verification. Accepts multipart form data with one or more files.

files.description: One or more document files in PDF, JPEG, or PNG format

documentTypes.description: Document type for each file. Defaults to OWNER_OTHER.

documentNames.description: Human-readable labels for each file, for example NIC Front

get.summary: Get latest verification request status
get.description: Owner checks the current status of their most recent verification request: PENDING, APPROVED, or REJECTED.

get.summary: Get full verification request history
get.description: Owner views their full verification request history including all past requests.

get.summary: Get pending verification queue (admin only)
get.description: Admin views all verification requests currently in PENDING status awaiting review.

get.summary: Get all verification requests (admin only)
get.description: Admin views all verification requests across all statuses.

post.summary: Approve or reject a KYC verification request (admin only)
post.description: Admin approves or rejects an owner's KYC verification request. Approving sets owner verification status to APPROVED allowing them to list vehicles. Rejecting requires a reason.

approve.description: true to approve, false to reject

400.description: Request not in PENDING status or missing rejection reason

get.summary: Get all bookings on the platform (admin only)
get.description: Admin retrieves all bookings across the entire platform.

patch.description: Admin can change the status of any booking on the platform.

get.summary: Get all vehicles on the platform (admin only)
get.description: Admin view of all vehicles regardless of listing or availability status.

delete.description: Admin hard-deletes any vehicle listing regardless of owner.

patch.description: Admin toggles listing or availability status of any vehicle on the platform.

get.summary: Get all users (admin only)
get.description: Admin retrieves all registered users on the platform.

get.summary: Get all reviews for moderation (admin only)
get.description: Admin retrieves all reviews posted on the platform for moderation purposes.

post.summary: Create or retrieve a chat session
post.description: Start a conversation with another user between a renter and an owner. If a session between these two users for this vehicle already exists it is returned instead of creating a duplicate.

targetUserId.description: User ID of the person to chat with

vehicleId.description: Optional vehicle context for the chat

get.summary: Get my chat sessions
get.description: Get all chat sessions for the current user sorted by most recent message first.

get.summary: Get messages in a chat session
get.description: Retrieve paginated messages for a chat session ordered oldest first.

post.summary: Send a message in a chat session
post.description: Send a text message in an existing chat session.

textContent.example: Hello, is the vehicle still available?

patch.summary: Mark all messages in a session as read
patch.description: Mark all unread messages in a session as read for the current user.

get.summary: Get total unread message count
get.description: Get the total number of unread messages across all chat sessions for the current user.
